title: carex longii
intro: Carex longii, also known as the long sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex longii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for skin and wound care.
